# Current state: blue block at rows 20-23 (top), red block at rows 30-33 (middle)
# Let me try to get red block to vertical position and blue block to bottom position

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'b'] and n['pixels'] > 10:

        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows={min_r}-{max_r} cols={min_c}-{max_c} pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
